infoPlist.NSBluetoothAlwaysUsageDescription: Danger Fitness uses Bluetooth to connect to your heart rate monitor for real-time workout tracking.
infoPlist.NSBluetoothPeripheralUsageDescription: Danger Fitness uses Bluetooth to connect to your heart rate monitor.
infoPlist.NSHealthShareUsageDescription: Danger Fitness reads your heart rate, workout, and activity data to track your training progress and display real-time stats.
infoPlist.NSHealthUpdateUsageDescription: Danger Fitness saves your workout data to Apple Health so you can track your training across all your apps.
